title: A Strange Facility Beneath the Giant Tree
description: On pages 16–16, this part follows Unknown person #16, Hajrudin as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way I can ever forgive him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He insulted my mother and killed our father!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...do it already. This weeping Warrior thing has gotten old...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're so drunk on all this personal drama...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you can't even see the forest for the trees!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you're really like the rest...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...thinking I actually killed our father in cold blood...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You don't really buy it, do you?

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 12 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
